price_manual_valuation_missing.message: Manual/custom holdings need a manual valuation before they can be included as valued performance positions.

price_no_market_data.message: Unable to fetch market data for some holdings. This may be due to invalid symbols or provider issues. Your portfolio value may be inaccurate.

price_stale_outdated.message: Some holdings haven't had prices updated in over 3 days. Your portfolio value may be inaccurate.

price_update_needed.message: Some holdings haven't had prices updated recently. Consider syncing prices.

fx_missing.message: We can't convert some holdings to your base currency. This affects your total portfolio value.

fx_stale_error.message: Some exchange rates haven't been updated in over 3 days. Currency conversions may be inaccurate.

fx_stale_warning.title_other: Exchange rate updates needed for {{count}} currencies
fx_stale_warning.message: Some exchange rates haven't been updated recently. Consider refreshing rates.

classification_missing_category.message: Some holdings don't have an {{taxonomy}} assigned. This affects your allocation charts and analytics.

classification_legacy_migration.message: Some assets have sector/country data from the old format. Migrate to the new taxonomy system for better allocation tracking.

data_orphan_activity_account.message: Some transactions point to accounts that no longer exist. This may cause calculation errors.

data_orphan_activity_asset.message: Some transactions point to assets that no longer exist. This may cause calculation errors.

data_negative_position.message: Some holdings show negative quantities, which usually indicates missing or incorrect transactions.

data_legacy_classification.message: Some assets have legacy sector/country data that can be migrated to the new classification system.

data_negative_account_balance.message: One or more accounts show a negative total value in their history. This is usually caused by missing buy transactions. Review your activities to fix this.

data_negative_cash_balance.title_one: Cash account had a negative balance
data_negative_cash_balance.title_other: {{count}} cash accounts had a negative balance
data_negative_cash_balance.message: One or more cash accounts show a negative balance in their history. This may be a normal bank overdraft or a missing deposit entry.

data_missing_lot_disposal_for_sell.message: A sale could not be matched to a lot, so realized gain/loss and performance attribution may be incomplete.

data_missing_generated_valuation.message: Some holdings snapshot dates do not have generated valuation rows. Rebuild account history after fixing missing prices, manual valuations, or FX rates.

data_incomplete_valuation_value.title_other: {{count}} valuation rows have incomplete market value
data_incomplete_valuation_value.message: Some generated valuation rows have incomplete market value coverage. Performance protects correctness by marking affected returns unavailable or degraded; review missing prices or manual valuations.

data_incomplete_valuation_basis.message: Some positions have missing or partial acquisition cost basis. Market value can still be shown, but gain/loss and cost-basis returns may be unavailable until the related activities are fixed.

data_unknown_performance_flow_source.title_other: {{count}} valuation rows have unknown transfer classification
data_unknown_performance_flow_source.message: Some generated valuation rows include a transfer or flow whose portfolio boundary is unknown. Review transfer activities on the affected dates and mark each transfer external or link it to its matching account.

account_unconfigured.message_one: Choose a tracking mode to start syncing data.
account_unconfigured.message_other: Choose tracking modes to start syncing data.

account_timezone_missing.title: Timezone not configured
account_timezone_missing.message: Set your timezone in General settings to ensure dates match your locale.

account_timezone_invalid.title: Configured timezone is invalid
account_timezone_invalid.message: The configured timezone "{{timezone}}" is invalid. Update it in General settings.

account_timezone_mismatch.title: Browser and app timezones differ
account_timezone_mismatch.message: Configured timezone is "{{configured}}" but browser timezone is "{{browser}}". Dates follow the configured timezone.

quote_sync_error.message: These assets have repeatedly failed to sync prices. Check the symbols or data provider settings.

quote_sync_warning.message: Some assets are having trouble syncing prices. This may resolve automatically.

transfer_incomplete.message: A transfer is unpaired or missing its matching leg, so its flow was treated as external and may distort returns. Pair it with the matching transfer, or mark it external if that is intended.

page.heading: Data Health
page.text: Identify and resolve data quality issues

healthy.title: Your Data Looks Great
healthy.description: No issues found. Your portfolio data is consistent and up to date.

sheet.groupedPriceMessage: Wealthfolio is using carried-forward prices for these dates. Refetch or add prices for real trading days; dismiss the issue if the dates were holidays or non-trading days.
sheet.pricesByInvestmentHint: Open an investment to refetch or add prices. If the dates were holidays or non-trading days, dismiss the issue.

priceStaleness.label: Price Staleness
priceStaleness.description: Market prices are outdated and need to be refreshed. This can affect the accuracy of your portfolio valuation.

fxIntegrity.label: Exchange Rates
fxIntegrity.description: Missing or outdated exchange rates for currency conversion. This may impact multi-currency portfolio calculations.

classification.label: Classification
classification.description: Assets are missing categories or classifications. This affects portfolio breakdowns and allocation analysis.

dataConsistency.label: Data Consistency
dataConsistency.description: Inconsistencies detected in portfolio data. This may cause inaccurate reporting or calculations.

accountConfiguration.label: Account Setup
accountConfiguration.description: Some accounts need configuration before data can be synced. Set tracking mode to start importing data.

settingsConfiguration.label: Settings
settingsConfiguration.description: Some application settings need attention to ensure data is interpreted correctly.

timezoneMissing.label: Timezone Settings
timezoneMissing.description: Your app timezone is not configured. Until you set it, user-facing dates may not match your locale.

timezoneInvalid.label: Timezone Settings
timezoneInvalid.description: Your configured timezone is invalid. Update it in General settings to restore consistent date handling.

timezoneMismatch.label: Timezone Settings
timezoneMismatch.description: Your browser timezone differs from the configured app timezone. Portfolio dates follow the configured timezone.

dismissConfirm.title: Dismiss this issue?
dismissConfirm.message: This will hide the issue from your health center. It will reappear if the underlying data changes.
